prompt_en:
15-second hyper-cinematic Netflix crime-thriller teaser, 16:9, streaming-trailer pacing. Premium anamorphic / high-end digital capture: clean cinematic realism only — natural skin texture, soft cinematic bloom, subtle oval bokeh, practical neon and LED accents; controlled high-energy momentum with Fincher-level restraint. Clean shadow detail, refined texture, controlled highlight roll-off, deliberate contrast; premium streaming look.

Show: TIKTOK DRUG DYNASTY — a broke chemistry prodigy and small-time beauty influencer accidentally create the internet's most addictive synthetic party drug, then scale a narcotics empire through livestreams, viral trends, and teenage influencer distribution faster than cartels or the DEA can parse. Crime nested inside content — unboxings, comments, trends, parasocial performance; violence one scroll away. Tone: Euphoria neon-youth intimacy + Breaking Bad escalation + Queen of the South glamour-as-armor, filtered through algorithm culture. Nobody knows who's acting vs real — including Nina.

Color world: magenta and cyan reflections, chrome silver, warm olive skin, deep nightclub blacks, ring-light and phone-screen glow.

Character lock: @image_file_1 is the official Nina Vale character main sheet — use it as the primary design reference for wardrobe, jewelry, body proportions, and hairstyle. @image_file_1's character as the subject — Nina Vale, 22, Cuban-American: sharp, unreadable, hyper-observant; dark messy bun with loose strands; silver hoops, layered silver chains and rings; offline oversized hoodies, cargos, worn luxe-knockoff sneakers, tired eyes; online polished influencer magnetism under ring light. Quiet in rooms, magnetic in feeds; motivated by escape, attention, rent — then discovers she can scale.

0–2s: Extreme macro on her eye; livestream UI, comments and follower counts reflecting across iris and cheek; shallow depth, clean speculars.

2–4s: Fast whip-pan — Miami apartment/lab hybrid: foreground creator setup (ring light, phone rig) sharp one beat; chemistry glassware softly simmering blurred behind; any labels softened and illegible in bokeh.

4–5s: Pink synthetic tablets drop onto polished marble, ultra slow motion, crisp reflections.

5–7s: Rapid impressionistic montage: PR stacks, nightclub strobes, screens with livestreams, silhouettes watching feeds, burner phones multiplying on glass, vacuum-sealed bundles closing, palm trunks with distant police color wash.

7–9s: Slow tracking through packed nightclub kitchen corridor — crowd and staff motion blur; Nina sharp and calm at center.

9–11s: Staccato montage on distorted bass: silhouette beat on wet tile and stiletto, TikTok comments at illegible speed, luxury yacht at night, phone smashed to black, Nina underwater in cyan-lit pool with caustics.

11–13s: Emotional close-up: Nina alone in near-dark, face lit only by phone; exhausted eyes, micro lip twitch, viewer count UI climbing.

13–14s: Bass drop — machine-gun montage: muzzle-flash read purely as abstract light and lens flare, livestream HUD overlays, silhouetted intimate beat, raid flashlight beams, pills skittering on tile, rain-slick Miami streets, helicopter searchlight on skyline.

14–15s: Hard cut to black. On-screen end title only: hot pink clean sans-serif TIKTOK DRUG DYNASTY, subtitle FAME IS THE NEW CARTEL. Hold briefly on black.
prompt_zh:
15秒 Netflix 级别罪案惊悚流媒体先导预告，16:9，快节奏但克制的高端电影写实。干净的高级数字摄影质感：自然皮肤纹理、柔和电影感光晕、椭圆形散景、霓虹与LED实用光；有控制的爆发力但保持芬奇式精密。追求干净层次与高级滚动高光，整体精致流媒体质感。

剧集核心《TIKTOK DRUG DYNASTY》：穷困化学天才兼小型美妆网红误做出全网最上瘾的合成派对药，借直播、病毒趋势与青少年网红分发体系，在毒枭与缉毒机关反应之前堆出毒品帝国。罪案嵌在内容里——开箱、评论、趋势、人设表演；暴力永远离一次划屏不远。气质：亢奋 neon 青春亲密 + 绝命毒师式 escalation + 南方女王式珠光危险，但真正的反派是算法。无人分辨谁在演、谁真实——包括妮娜自己。

色彩：洋红与青反光、铬银高亮、暖橄榄皮、夜店黑、环形灯与手机屏幕补光。

角色锁定：@image_file_1 为妮娜·韦尔官方角色设定主表——服装、首饰、比例、发型以之为准。@image_file_1 的角色即主体：22岁古巴裔美国女性，锋利难读、极度观察力强；深色乱髻与脸周碎发；银圈耳饰、叠戴银链与戒指；线下帽衫工装裤、磨损潮鞋、疲惫眼神；线上一秒切到精致网红气场。现实里寡言，直播间致命吸引；起初只为逃离与房租，然后发现规模化天赋。

0–2秒：极致宏观眼部特写；直播界面、评论与暴涨粉丝数映射在虹膜与脸颊；浅景深、高光干净。

2–4秒：急速摇镜——迈阿密公寓×直播间×实验台混合体：前景环形灯与手机架一时清晰；背景玻璃器皿微沸虚焦；标签融入景深虚化、不可辨。

4–5秒：粉色合成药片落在抛光大理石上，超慢动作，反射利。

5–7秒：快闪蒙太奇印象：公关礼盒堆、夜店频闪、屏幕直播、人影监视、一次性手机在桌面增殖、塑封现金抽真空、棕榈树干外警灯远色。

7–9秒：穿过拥挤夜店后厨走廊慢轨跟拍——人群与员工动态糊化；妮娜位于中心冷静锐利。

9–11秒：失真低音上短促连击蒙太奇：湿瓷砖与高跟剪影式节奏、TikTok 评论快扫难辨、夜航游艇、手机砸碎转黑、青光灯下泳池水下与焦散。

11–13秒：情绪近景：近全黑环境仅靠手机光照脸；极度疲惫眼神、唇角微颤、在线观众数猛增。

13–14秒：低频落点——机枪式快切：枪口焰仅作抽象高光与镜头眩光、直播 HUD 叠层、剪影亲密瞬间、搜查手电束、药片在砖面滑开、雨水迈阿密街、直升机扫城市天际。

14–15秒：切黑。仅片尾字幕：亮粉红无衬线《TIKTOK DRUG DYNASTY》，副标题《FAME IS THE NEW CARTEL》。黑场略停留。

technical_notes.lens_feel: 35mm environment / 85mm portrait beats, shallow oval bokeh
technical_notes.references_tone: Euphoria intimacy + Breaking Bad math + Queen of the South sheen, algorithm-age paranoia
technical_notes.movement: whip-pans and snap montage on beats; slow corridor tracking for contrast; hero moments locked or slow push
technical_notes.cut_rhythm: teaser-density: ~1 beat per 1–2s accelerating into bass drop; hold title on black
technical_notes.ref_local: NinaVale.png (must become public HTTPS URL in image_files[0] before xskill submit)

image_files_order: @image_file_1 = Nina Vale character main sheet (upload resized PNG URL here)
xskill_seedance.notes: REST/MCP: image_files must be public HTTPS URLs in array order matching @image_file_1 in the prompt. Resize long edge ≤ ~2048px; keep PNG small per seedance-super-seed2-api-guide.md. Default omni_reference (omit functionMode): use image_files with @image_file_*. Set first_last_frames only with filePaths for true first/last frame or text-only. Photoreal faces + drug/violence montage may hit Dreamina moderation; soften or silhouettes on retry.
